---
name: New Agent Contribution
about: Propose a new agent definition for the library
title: "[Agent] "
labels: library
---

## Domain

What domain or field does this agent operate in? (e.g., backend engineering, UX research, DevOps)

## Role Title

The name for this agent role (e.g., "API Designer", "Migration Specialist").

## Key Responsibilities

What does this agent do? List 3-5 core responsibilities:

- Responsibility 1
- Responsibility 2
- Responsibility 3

## Deliverables

What artifacts does this agent produce?

- Deliverable 1 (e.g., "API specification document")
- Deliverable 2 (e.g., "Migration plan with rollback steps")

## Why This Agent

What need does this agent fill that existing library agents do not cover? Include examples of projects or tasks where this agent would be valuable.
